items.title: Many march in “No Kings” demonstrations across the US
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Many gathered for "No Kings" demonstrations across the U.S. on the same day that a massive military parade to celebrate the U.S. Army’s 250th anniversary, requested by President Donald Trump, is getting underway in Washington D.C.

#news #nokings #trump</article>

items.title: Trump arrives on stage for military parade in DC
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>The grand military parade that President Donald Trump had been wanting for eight years kicked off Saturday with tanks, troops and a 21-gun salute. 

#trump #militaryparade 

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: LIVE: ‘No Kings’ protest held against Trump in Los Angeles
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Watch live from Los Angeles as opponents of President Donald Trump’s agenda are rallying in hundreds of cities nationwide for “No Kings” protests. 

#losangeles #nokings</article>

items.title: Authorities search for suspect in shooting of 2 Minnesota lawmakers
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Authorities are searching for a 57-year-old man suspected of shooting two Minnesota lawmakers, officials tell The Associated Press. Two people familiar with the matter identified the suspect being sought as 57-year-old Vance Boelter.  

#minnesota 

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: Iran missiles intercepted in the sky above Amman in Jordan
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Iranian missiles were seen being intercepted in the sky above the Jordanian capital, Amman, late on Saturday. Jordan had said earlier that its air force and defense systems would intercept any missiles and drones that enter its airspace, for fear they would fall in its territory. 

#israel #iran #amman #jordan 

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: Thousands gather for 'No Kings' protest in Los Angeles
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Thousands gathered for "No Kings" protest in Los Angeles and across the U.S. after resistance to ICE raids led Trump to deploy 4,700 troops to the city.

#nokings #losangeles #trump 

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: India’s Prime Minister Narendra Modi visits survivor of plane crash and crash site
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi visited the only survivor and the site of the Air India plane crash, which killed at least 270 people. 

#news #india #narendramodi #airindia</article>

items.title: LIVE: Jerusalem skyline after Iran's retaliatory attack on Israel
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Live from Jerusalem after Iran launched retaliatory missile and drone strikes on Israel into Saturday morning, killing at least three people and wounding dozens. It comes following a series of deadly Israeli attacks on Iran’s nuclear program and its armed forces.

#iran #israel #jerusalem</article>

items.title: Drone video shows damage in Israel after Iran’s retaliatory strikes
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Drone footage shows damage from an Iranian strike on a neighborhood in Rishon Lezion, Israel.

#news #israel #iran</article>

items.title: Relatives of India plane crash victims wait for news as bodies being identified
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Hundreds of relatives of the victims of one of India's worst aviation disasters have provided DNA samples to help identify the dead. At least 270 people were killed in Gujarat State on Thursday, when an Air India flight fell from the sky. (AP video shot by: Piyush Nagpal and Shonal Ganguly).

#airindia #india #ahmedabad 

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: Israel threatens further attacks after Iran retaliates
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Israel warned of more attacks on Iran on Saturday after Tehran fired waves of missiles and drones that killed three people and wounded dozens in Israel.

#iran #israel #news 

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: Minnesota lawmaker Melissa Hortman and husband shot and killed, Walz says
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>A Minnesota lawmaker and her husband were shot and killed in their home early Saturday by someone posing as a police officer and a second lawmaker and his wife were wounded in what Gov. Tim Walz described as “targeted political violence.” Read more: https://bit.ly/43Vd9Al 

#minnesota #melissahortman #news 

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: Pope Leo XIV urges Israel and Iran to show responsibility and reason
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Pope Leo XIV on Saturday urged Israel and Iran to show responsibility and act reasonably, following an exchange of intense airstrikes between the two countries that killed dozens of civilians.

#israel #iran #popeleoxiv

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

items.title: Tel Aviv residents react to Iran's retaliatory strikes against Israel
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Residents in Tel Aviv reacted on Saturday to an Iranian retaliatory attack on Israel, expressing differing views on how the conflict was affecting their daily lives.

#iran #israel #news

items.title: Military parade LIVE: In DC as ‘No Kings’ protests held against Trump
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Watch live coverage of the U.S. military parade in Washington, D.C. The parade commemorates the U.S. Army’s 250th anniversary, which coincides with President Donald Trump’s 79th birthday. Opponents of Trump’s agenda are rallying in hundreds of cities nationwide for “No Kings” protests. 

#trump #nokings #live</article>
